tasks.title: Add helper method for parsing dates in planner
tasks.description: Create a unified utility function within src/lib/planner-derivations.ts to parse date inputs safely. This function should accept a string or Date, handle invalid formats, and return a clean ISO-8601 substring format (YYYY-MM-DD).

tasks.title: Add test coverage for parsed date parser utility
tasks.description: Add comprehensive unit tests in src/lib/__tests__/planner-derivations.test.ts to verify the date parsing utility handles typical dates, edge cases, empty values, and invalid formats correctly.
